# WhichToUse

> Hands-on AI tool reviews: we open each product, read its documentation, and try it
> wherever we can, then rank apps and open-source skills by what you're doing.
> Two tracks per use case (app/SaaS and open-source skill/repo), each pick carrying
> the reasoning for its rank, verified pricing, strengths/limitations and sources.

## Machine-readable
- Category index: /api/categories.json
- Per category: /api/c/<slug>.json  (overall top-10/track, growth top-5/track, cross-form Best 3)

## Categories
- 找客户/获客: /api/c/lead-gen.json
- SEO/GEO: /api/c/seo-geo.json
- 内容写作: /api/c/content-writing.json
- 生成视频: /api/c/video-generation.json
- UI设计: /api/c/ui-design.json
